home.featureMentorship: Get guidance from experienced consultants and mentors.

home.testimonial1Text: ScholarPath helped me find and win a full scholarship to study abroad.
home.testimonial2Text: The community here is amazing. I got great advice from experienced consultants.

validation.passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character.
validation.passwordMustDiffer: New password must be different from current password.
validation.roleNotAllowed: Selected role must be Student, Consultant, or Company.
validation.companyNameRequired: Company name is required for Company accounts.
validation.companyNameMaxLength: Company name must not exceed 200 characters.
validation.expertiseAreaRequired: Expertise area is required for Consultant accounts.

validation.bioRequired: Bio is required for Consultant accounts.
validation.invalidNameCharacters: Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
validation.maxLength: This field exceeds the maximum allowed length
